purpose: MAS-native machine surface for the paper figure AI/VLM polish lifecycle after deterministic rendering.
machine_boundary: The enforceable validator lives in med_autoscience.figure_polish_lifecycle_contract. This JSON file indexes the stable surface name, path, state sequence, relationships, and authority boundaries for other agents and contract readers.

paper_surface.prefix_policy: Events must begin with draft_rendered and may only be an ordered prefix of the state sequence. Hard gates cannot be skipped or reordered; publication_manifested requires prior audit_clear.
paper_surface.ai_vlm_actor_policy: Any AI/VLM actor event must carry model_ref or reviewer_ref.

figure_visual_audit_receipt.relationship: Lifecycle events cite the visual audit receipt as evidence for visual_audit_findings and audit_clear states. The receipt remains quality evidence, not publication authority.

display_pack_lock_publication_figure_qua.relationship: The lifecycle cites the display_pack_lock publication_figure_quality_refs block to bind the polish loop to the paper-level figure quality refs, status, and hashes preserved by packaging.

authority_boundaries.data_statistics_evidence_marks: Figure polish lifecycle events cannot mutate data, statistics, or evidence marks.
authority_boundaries.publication_authority: No lifecycle event can carry publication verdicts, submission readiness, source readiness, artifact authority, domain ready, or production ready claims.
